elements.original_description: A simple glowing lightbulb with a smiling face, surrounded by colorful rays of light. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: A professional 2D minimalist icon of a simple glowing lightbulb with a cheerful smiling face. The lightbulb is surrounded by bright, vivid, and colorful rays of light radiating outward. Clean flat vector art with high contrast and sharp edges. Pure white background. No shading, no gradients, no text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks. The mood is bright and positive, conveying inspiration and a spark of an idea.

elements.original_description: A cartoon hand holding a small golden key, with sparkles radiating outward. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: A professional 2D minimalist icon of a cartoon hand holding a small golden key. The key shines with a metallic luster. Glittering sparkles and stars radiate outward from the key. Clean flat vector art with high contrast and sharp edges. Pure white background. No shading, no gradients, no text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks. The mood is magical and promising, conveying unlocking potential and discovery.
